template_permission_denied.title: Resolving Auto-Enrollment Failures Caused by Missing Template Security Configuration Entries

steps.expect: Throws an operational failure string indicating 'Access is denied' or status code 0x80094012
Reveals that Domain Users or targeted computers are missing explicit 'Enroll' and 'Autoenroll' permissions
Updates the Active Directory security descriptor data structures for the target template cleanly
Processes the request successfully, generating and installing the certificate to the local store
